name: Pumpkin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Deborah Epstein
My note: I usually add a handful of chopped dates and prepare them along with the raisins in the same way. Also, add a handful of chopped nuts when mixing in the raisins.
Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
Measure raisins and pour boiling water over them to cover. Allow to plump up, then drain.
Beat together eggs, milk, brown sugar, butter, pumpkin in a bowl.
Mix flour, baking powder, salt, ground cloves, cinnamon, nutmeg in another bowl.
Add the pumpkin mixture to the flour mixture and stir just enough to moisten and combine. Lumps are okay!
Pour batter into greased muffin pans about 2/3 full.
Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Makes 18 muffins. (When made in large muffin tins, yields 6 bigger muffins.)
